label: 第257話
source_locator: 単行本29巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 宿儺が胎内で喰った双子の魂と虎杖の血筋、羂索による虎杖誕生の関係が語られる。虎杖は御厨子を発現し、黒閃を連続で宿儺へ打ち込む。単行本29巻の補足では、双子と同じ魂を持つのは虎杖の祖父・倭助と訂正されている。
summary_full: 宿儺が胎内で喰った双子の魂と虎杖の血筋、羂索による虎杖誕生の関係が語られる。虎杖は御厨子を発現し、黒閃を連続で宿儺へ打ち込む。単行本29巻の補足では、双子と同じ魂を持つのは虎杖の祖父・倭助と訂正されている。宿儺と虎杖の血縁、羂索が虎杖誕生へ関与した事情が説明される。単行本では宿儺の双子と同じ魂を持つ人物を虎杖倭助と訂正し、虎杖は御厨子を発現する。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: The uncanny origins of 虎杖悠仁 are revealed! The special circumstances surrounding 悠仁's existence grant him the potential to not only rival the King of Curses , but surpass him!
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: Before his showdown with 五条悟 , 宿儺 is questioned by 裏梅 about the true nature of 虎杖悠仁 . 宿儺 reveals that 悠仁 is the child of 羂索 , and that 悠仁’s father, 虎杖仁 , is the reincarnation of his twin brother, who he devoured in their mother's womb. He further explains that 羂索 implanted one of his fingers into 悠仁 at birth, allowing 悠仁 to serve both as 宿儺’s vessel and as a participant in the 死滅回游 . 裏梅 wonders whether this lineage means 悠仁 possesses the potential to rival 宿儺. 悠仁 hits 宿儺 with several consectuvie 黒閃. In the present, 悠仁 and 宿儺 exchange blows imbued with 黒閃 , sending 悠仁 flying backward. As 悠仁 catches himself on a pillar, markings resembling intersecting cut lines and scissors appear across it. At this point, 悠仁 possesses two cursed techniques : 赤血操術 , obtained by absorbing 呪胎九相図 Wombs Nos. 4–9, and 御廚子 , which was engraved into him through 宿儺’s incarnation and drawn forth by the awakened state induced through repeated 黒閃. 悠仁 slices through the pillar and hurls it at 宿儺, who effortlessly reduces it to fragments. Using the debris as cover, 悠仁 grabs 宿儺’s foot and attempts to sever it with 御廚子. 宿儺 retaliates with a barrage of slashes, but 悠仁 presses through the damage and lands a powerful body blow, triggering his third 黒閃. After being knocked away, 宿儺 regenerates his injured foot and notes that although 悠仁 is wielding the same 術式 as himself, its manifestation differs due to the vastly different eras in which they were born. He further observes that 悠仁’s output remains low, as the technique has only recently awakened. 猪野 does his best to assist 悠仁. At some point prior, 猪野 consulted with 五条, 硝子 , and 伊地知 about whether he should be permitted to use 七海 ’s cursed tool . Despite his hesitation, 猪野 was surprised when they unanimously approve, explaining that 七海 trusted 猪野 more than anyone else. Don't just rival the King... surpass him! Back in the present, 猪野 uses summons to call forth Auspicious Beast Number Four: 龍 . The serpentine, dragon-like 式神 erupts from 猪野’s hands and smashes 宿儺 into the wall behind him, though it is swiftly destroyed by 宿儺’s slashes. 猪野 follows up by swinging 七海’s blunt sword, but 宿儺 halts the strike with his foot. Even so, the brief distraction allows 悠仁 to land his fourth 黒閃, blasting 宿儺 away. As the pain-dulling effects of 麒麟 fade, 猪野 collapses to the ground, believing he has failed to fulfill his role. Meanwhile, 宿儺 grows increasingly enraged by 悠仁’s unbroken chain of 黒閃, convinced that 悠仁 is attempting to stand as his equal. When 悠仁 leaps toward him, 宿儺 shatters the ground beneath 悠仁’s feet before striking him with a combination of a punch and slashing attacks. The injuries fail to slow 悠仁, who retaliates by hurling 宿儺 into a wall and landing his fifth 黒閃. 宿儺 counters by grabbing 悠仁’s face and activating his 術式, deeply carving into the right side of it. Undeterred, 悠仁 responds with a powerful punch to 宿儺’s face, triggering his sixth 黒閃. This fully infuriates 宿儺, who begins to curse 悠仁, only to be interrupted when 七海’s blunt sword slices him, revealed to have been thrown by 猪野. Encouraged by 猪野’s shout, 悠仁 strikes once more, landing his seventh consecutive 黒閃 with an uppercut against the King of Curses’ back.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 宿儺 裏梅 (回想) 羂索 (言及のみ) 虎杖仁 (言及のみ) 虎杖悠仁 五条悟 (回想) 伊地知潔高 (回想) 家入硝子 (回想) 七海建人 (言及のみ) 猪野琢真
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 七海's 鈍刀 宿儺の術式 御廚子 捌／解 捌／解 猪野琢真の術式 来訪瑞獣 麒麟 龍 麒麟 龍 虎杖悠仁の術式 黒閃 御廚子

editorial_notes: 単行本29巻補足候補：宿儺の双子と同じ魂を持つ人物は虎杖倭助。本文・EXTRA PAGESの最終照合対象。
単行本29巻補足候補：宿儺の双子と同じ魂を持つ人物は虎杖倭助。本文・EXTRA PAGESの最終照合対象。
key_events_verified_phase11: 宿儺が胎内で喰った双子の魂と虎杖の血筋、羂索による虎杖誕生の関係が語られる。
虎杖は御厨子を発現し、黒閃を連続で宿儺へ打ち込む。
単行本29巻の補足では、双子と同じ魂を持つのは虎杖の祖父・倭助と訂正されている。
宿儺と虎杖の血縁、羂索が虎杖誕生へ関与した事情が説明される。
単行本では宿儺の双子と同じ魂を持つ人物を虎杖倭助と訂正し、虎杖は御厨子を発現する。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
